columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Order identifier from Pub/Sub event payload; FK to stg_orders; cross-path deduplication join key; cluster column

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order

columns.name: order_status
columns.description: Event type: order_placed, order_shipped, order_delivered, order_cancelled; cluster column

columns.name: total_amount
columns.description: Total order value at time of event

columns.name: currency
columns.description: ISO 4217 currency code

columns.name: shipping_address
columns.description: Shipping destination address; nullable in source

columns.name: payment_method
columns.description: Payment method; nullable in source

columns.name: order_date
columns.description: Order placement date; DAY partition column

columns.name: shipped_at
columns.description: Ship timestamp; populated for order_shipped events only

columns.name: delivered_at
columns.description: Delivery timestamp; populated for order_delivered events only

columns.name: cancelled_at
columns.description: Cancellation timestamp; populated for order_cancelled events only

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Original order creation timestamp from event payload

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Last state-change timestamp; used in batch reconciliation watermark comparison

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Unique order identifier; NOT NULL and unique per acceptance criteria; MERGE key for batch upsert; cluster column

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: User who placed the order; NOT NULL in source

columns.name: order_status
columns.description: Current lifecycle status; cluster column for status-filtered queries

columns.name: total_amount
columns.description: Total order value; NOT NULL in source

columns.name: currency
columns.description: ISO 4217 currency code; NOT NULL in source

columns.name: shipping_address
columns.description: Shipping destination; nullable in source

columns.name: payment_method
columns.description: Payment method; nullable in source

columns.name: order_date
columns.description: Order placement date; DAY partition column

columns.name: shipped_at
columns.description: Ship timestamp; null until order ships

columns.name: delivered_at
columns.description: Delivery timestamp; null until delivered

columns.name: cancelled_at
columns.description: Cancellation timestamp; null unless cancelled

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Source creation timestamp; NOT NULL

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Last update in source; incremental watermark for 02:00 UTC daily batch load

columns.name: item_id
columns.description: Unique line item identifier; MERGE key for batch upsert deduplication

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: FK to stg_orders.order_id; cluster column

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Product identifier; cluster column for product analytics

columns.name: product_name
columns.description: Product name at time of order

columns.name: quantity
columns.description: Units ordered

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: Per-unit price at time of order

columns.name: discount_amount
columns.description: Line-level discount; null when no discount applied

columns.name: line_total
columns.description: Net line value after discount

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Line item creation timestamp; DAY partition column — surrogate for order_date absent from source

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Last update in source; incremental watermark for 02:00 UTC daily batch load

cardinality.notes: One order contains one or more line items; order_id NOT NULL in both tables; enforced at application level as BigQuery has no declarative FK constraints
One order generates up to four streaming lifecycle events; stg_order_events is append-only with one row per state transition; deduplication on order_id across both Lambda paths
